case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. NATHAN RANGO

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-23-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO FEB-27-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SARAH HEYWORTH. DEFENDANT NATHAN RANGO IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE AS DEFENDANT IS EXPECTED TO PAY THE ENTIRE CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-27-2024 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-20-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JUSTIN HOLMES. DEFENDANT NATHAN RANGO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE AS TO DEFENDANT RANGO, NATHAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-23-2024 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY STEVEN ADELSON. DEFENDANT NATHAN RANGO IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF APPEARED AND STATED THE CASE HAS SETTLED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
